title: Amtech S1498 Manual Siphon Pump
features: VERSATILE: This manual siphon pump is ideal for cleaning out small tanks, brewing casks or strong containers
DURABLE AND EFFICIENT: Made from hard wearing polyethylene, it has an efficient 6.5 litres/minute maximum flow rate
CLEANING ADVICE: After use wash all parts thoroughly with warm soapy water and allow to air dry
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your automotive requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
